title: Calories Burned on Treadmill (Walking, Running, and Incline Chart)
introduction: Treadmill workouts are easy to standardize, which makes calorie tracking easier. Here is a practical treadmill calorie-burn chart for walking, jogging, and incline sessions.

sections.heading: 🏃‍♂️ Quick Answer: Treadmill Calories Burned in 30 Minutes
sections.content:
| Body Weight | Walk 3.0 mph | Walk Incline 6% | Jog 5.0 mph | Run 6.5 mph |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 120 lb (54 kg) | 90-120 kcal | 150-210 kcal | 200-280 kcal | 260-360 kcal |
| 150 lb (68 kg) | 110-150 kcal | 190-260 kcal | 250-340 kcal | 320-450 kcal |
| 180 lb (82 kg) | 130-180 kcal | 220-310 kcal | 290-400 kcal | 380-520 kcal |
| 210 lb (95 kg) | 150-210 kcal | 260-360 kcal | 340-460 kcal | 430-600 kcal |

Use the [Calorie Burn Calculator](/tools/calorie-burn-calculator) for your exact treadmill settings.

sections.heading: How Incline Changes Treadmill Burn
sections.content:
| Incline | Approx Burn Increase vs Flat |
| --- | --- |
| 1-2% | +5-12% |
| 3-5% | +15-30% |
| 6-10% | +30-60% |

Incline walking is a strong low-impact option for increasing burn.

sections.heading: Treadmill Fat-Loss Session Examples
sections.content:
| Session Type | Structure | Who It Fits |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Steady walk | 30-45 min at 3.0-3.5 mph | Beginners |
| Incline walk | 25-40 min with 3-8% incline | Low-impact fat loss |
| Run intervals | 1 min hard / 2 min easy x 10 | Intermediate/advanced |

Choose the format you can sustain weekly.

sections.heading: Track Beyond the Machine Display
sections.content:
Treadmills can over- or under-estimate calories.

• Use your body weight + duration for estimates
• Track weekly body-weight trend
• Keep nutrition consistent in Eati

Reliable trends beat one-session estimates.

midArticleCta: Use the Calorie Burn Calculator for your treadmill settings, then track intake in Eati so treadmill sessions support real progress.
conclusion: Treadmills are excellent for repeatable calorie-burn sessions. Use realistic intensity, include incline strategically, and pair training with daily nutrition tracking in Eati.
metaTitle: Calories Burned on Treadmill: Walking, Running & Incline Table
metaDescription: Find calories burned on treadmill by speed, incline, and body weight with practical 30-minute burn charts for fat-loss planning.

faqs.question: Are treadmill calorie numbers accurate?
faqs.answer: They are approximate. Accuracy improves when your body weight is updated and intensity assumptions are realistic.

faqs.question: Is incline walking better than jogging for fat loss?
faqs.answer: Both can be effective. Incline walking may be easier on joints and often improves consistency for many people.
